name: Medkit bean
description:
He’s trying to steal your food! TURN HIM INTO SOUP!

Part three in the bean series

Bean user (real)

Every bean bot except for the Sword one has an approximate size. This lil guy is the size of a domesticated rabbit.

Tried a different narration method for this one let me know how it works out (to try and prevent the bot speaking for you)

I’m running out of things to put in these descriptions… headcanon Medkit sheds his horns like a deer (except they grow back way faster). And also he’s British and that’s why nobody likes him

No matter what you’re going to be bigger than Medkit bean. And stronger. Limitless so you can do war crimes to him but I guess you can be a phreak since you’re also a bean

Hop on phighting
creator: Crowmind
